type_definitions.name: GitShowTrackBlobReader
type_definitions.description: Existing infrastructure secondary adapter implementing TrackBlobReader via git show. Extended by this track to implement: (a) the two new port methods added to TrackBlobReader (read_catalogue_for_spec_ref_check — (TypeCatalogueDocument, String) where String = raw-bytes SHA-256 for stale detection; read_catalogue_spec_signals_document — CatalogueSpecSignalsDocument); and (b) the new SpecElementHashReader port introduced in T009 (read_spec_element_hashes — BTreeMap<SpecElementId, ContentHash> for per-spec-element canonical hashes). All existing guard patterns are reused: symlink rejection, LANG=C fixation, BlobResult, path-not-found stderr parsing per ADR 2026-04-12-1200 §D4. The SpecElementHashReader impl shares the existing canonical_json_sha256 + build_element_map helpers from verify/plan_artifact_refs.rs (visibility raised to pub(crate)). action=modify because the adapter struct already exists in libs/infrastructure/src/verify/merge_gate_adapter.rs.

type_definitions.name: FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore
type_definitions.description: New infrastructure secondary adapter implementing CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter via filesystem atomic write. Writes <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json to track/items/<track_id>/<layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json using the same atomic write pattern as FsTrackStore / FsReviewStore. Placed in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/ (new module). Takes a workspace root path and delegates serialization to CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto via serde_json.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure serde DTO for <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json (schema v1). Fields: schema_version (u32, = 1), catalogue_declaration_hash (String, 64-char hex), signals (Vec<CatalogueSpecSignalDto>). deny_unknown_fields enforced at all nesting levels. No generated_at field (deterministic output per CN-06 / ADR D2.2). Used by the CatalogueSpecSignals codec (encode and decode) in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_spec_signals_codec.rs. Mirrors domain CatalogueSpecSignalsDocument.

type_definitions.name: TdddLayerBinding
type_definitions.description: Existing infrastructure struct describing one TDDD-enabled layer's configuration (layer_id, catalogue_file, catalogue_spec_signal_enabled, targets). T018 adds the `catalogue_spec_signal_enabled: bool` field alongside a new `pub fn catalogue_spec_signal_enabled()` accessor, both derived from the `tddd.catalogue_spec_signal.enabled` flag in `architecture-rules.json` (ADR §D5.4 phased activation). action=modify — the struct already exists in `libs/infrastructure/src/verify/tddd_layers.rs`; only a field + accessor were added, no behavioural semantics changed for existing fields.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueSpecSignalsCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error enum for the <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json codec. Variants follow existing codec conventions: Json (serde_json failures), UnsupportedSchemaVersion (version != 1), Validation (domain construction errors from CatalogueSpecSignal or ContentHash). Placed in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_spec_signals_codec.rs alongside CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto.
